title: Bump github.com/containers/common from 0.47.3 to 0.47.4
body:
Bumps [github.com/containers/common](https://github.com/containers/common) from 0.47.3 to 0.47.4.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/containers/common's releases.

v0.47.4

What's Changed

  • Retract the v1.0.0 version by @​mtrmac in containers/common#916
  • Add libimage/manifests.PushOptions.SourceFilter by @​nalind in containers/common#917
  • Fix console password reading on Windows by @​n1hility in containers/common#918
  • netavark: add support for dns with internal by @​Luap99 in containers/common#919
  • cni: do not add default route for internal networks by @​Luap99 in containers/common#920
  • build(deps): bump github.com/docker/distribution from 2.7.1+incompatible to 2.8.0+incompatible by @​dependabot in containers/common#922

Full Changelog: https://github.com/containers/common/compare/v1.0.1...v0.47.4

Commits
  • 14e985d Bump to v0.47.4
  • 8b7d0c3 Merge pull request #922 from containers/dependabot/go_modules/github.com/dock...
  • aa39f23 Merge pull request #920 from Luap99/internal-route
  • f559332 build(deps): bump github.com/docker/distribution
  • e9f1178 cni: do not add default route for internal networks
  • cba555c Merge pull request #919 from Luap99/netavark-internal-dns
  • ea34809 Merge pull request #918 from n1hility/fix-win-pass
  • 08f9799 Merge pull request #917 from nalind/manifest-filter
  • e030a76 netavark: add support for dns with internal
  • 8456918 Add libimage/manifests.PushOptions.SourceFilter
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

[![Dependabot compatibility score](https://dependabot-badges.githubapp.com/badges/compatibility_score?dependency-name=github.com/containers/common&package-manager=go_modules&previous-version=0.47.3&new-version=0.47.4)](https://docs.github.com/en/github/managing-security-vulnerabilities/about-dependabot-security-updates#about-compatibility-scores) Dependabot will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself. You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot merge` will merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot squash and merge` will squash and merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot cancel merge` will cancel a previously requested merge and block automerging - `@dependabot reopen` will reopen this PR if it is closed - `@dependabot close` will close this PR and stop Dependabot recreating it. You can achieve the same result by closing it manually - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself)

comments.body:
OK, I won't notify you again about this release, but will get in touch when a new version is available. If you'd rather skip all updates until the next major or minor version, let me know by commenting `@dependabot ignore this major version` or `@dependabot ignore this minor version`. You can also ignore all major, minor, or patch releases for a dependency by adding an [`ignore` condition](https://docs.github.com/en/code-security/supply-chain-security/configuration-options-for-dependency-updates#ignore) with the desired `update_types` to your config file.

If you change your mind, just re-open this PR and I'll resolve any conflicts on it.
